title: Chat Schema & Data Model
description:
Add ChatMessage, ChatChannel TypeScript interfaces and extend existing types for chat support.

## What to implement

### New interfaces in `packages/moe-daemon/src/types/schema.ts`:

```typescript
interface ChatMessage {
  id: string;                    // "msg-{uuid}"
  channel: string;               // channel ID
  sender: string;                // workerId or "human" or "system"
  content: string;               // message text (max 10KB)
  replyTo: string | null;        // parent message ID for threading
  mentions: string[];            // parsed @mentions (workerId strings)
  timestamp: string;             // ISO 8601
}

interface ChatChannel {
  id: string;                    // "chan-{uuid}"
  name: string;                  // "general", "epic-auth", "task-login"
  type: 'general' | 'epic' | 'task' | 'custom';
  linkedEntityId: string | null; // epicId or taskId if type is epic/task
  createdAt: string;
}
```

### Extend existing interfaces:

- `Worker` — add `chatCursors: Record<string, string>` (channelId → lastReadMessageId)
- `ProjectSettings` — add `chatEnabled: boolean` (default: true), `chatMaxAgentHops: number` (default: 4), `chatAutoCreateChannels: boolean` (default: true)
- `StateChangeEvent` — add variants `MESSAGE_CREATED` and `CHANNEL_CREATED`
- `MoeStateSnapshot` — add `channels: ChatChannel[]`

### Documentation:
- Update `docs/SCHEMA.md` with new types and storage layout

### Storage directories (documented, not created yet — migration task handles that):
- `.moe/channels/{channel-id}.json` — Channel metadata
- `.moe/messages/{channel-id}.jsonl` — Append-only JSONL per channel
definitionOfDone: ChatMessage and ChatChannel interfaces added to schema.ts
Worker interface extended with chatCursors field
ProjectSettings extended with chatEnabled, chatMaxAgentHops, chatAutoCreateChannels
StateChangeEvent extended with MESSAGE_CREATED and CHANNEL_CREATED variants
docs/SCHEMA.md updated with new types and storage layout
npm run build succeeds with no type errors

implementationPlan.description: Add ChatMessage and ChatChannel interfaces to packages/moe-daemon/src/types/schema.ts. ChatMessage: { id: string (msg-{uuid}), channel: string, sender: string, content: string, replyTo: string | null, mentions: string[], timestamp: string }. ChatChannel: { id: string (chan-{uuid}), name: string, type: 'general' | 'epic' | 'task' | 'custom', linkedEntityId: string | null, createdAt: string }. Export both interfaces alongside existing types. Add 'chan' and 'msg' to the ID prefix patterns.
implementationPlan.note: Added ChatMessage and ChatChannel interfaces. ChatMessage mirrors agentchattr's message model (id, channel, sender, content, replyTo for threading, mentions array, timestamp). ChatChannel adds typed channels with linkedEntityId for epic/task auto-channels. ID prefixes: msg- and chan-.

implementationPlan.description: Extend the Worker interface in schema.ts by adding optional field: chatCursors?: Record<string, string> (channelId to lastReadMessageId mapping). This field is optional so existing workers without it still validate. Add error handling notes: consumers must default to {} if undefined.
implementationPlan.note: Added chatCursors as optional Record<string, string> to Worker. Mirrors agentchattr's _cursors pattern (per-agent, per-channel last-read tracking). Optional so existing worker JSON files remain valid.

implementationPlan.description: Extend ProjectSettings interface in schema.ts with three new optional fields with defaults: chatEnabled?: boolean (default true), chatMaxAgentHops?: number (default 4), chatAutoCreateChannels?: boolean (default true). Mark as optional so existing projects without these fields still load correctly. Consumers should apply defaults via nullish coalescing for error handling.
implementationPlan.note: Added chatEnabled, chatMaxAgentHops (mirrors agentchattr's max_agent_hops=4), chatAutoCreateChannels. All optional for backward compat.

implementationPlan.description: Extend the StateChangeEvent union type in schema.ts with two new variants: { type: 'MESSAGE_CREATED'; payload: ChatMessage } and { type: 'CHANNEL_CREATED'; payload: ChatChannel }. Add 'MESSAGE_CREATED' and 'CHANNEL_CREATED' to the ActivityEventType union if applicable, or keep separate if chat events don't go to activity.log.
implementationPlan.note: StateChangeEvent lives in StateManager.ts (not schema.ts). Added MESSAGE_CREATED and CHANNEL_CREATED variants there with proper ChatMessage/ChatChannel payload types. Also added both to ACTIVITY_EVENT_TYPES in schema.ts so they can appear in activity.log.

implementationPlan.description: Extend MoeStateSnapshot interface in schema.ts by adding: channels: ChatChannel[]. This will be included in STATE_SNAPSHOT broadcasts to plugins. Messages are NOT included (fetched on-demand per channel).
implementationPlan.note: Added channels: ChatChannel[] to MoeStateSnapshot. Updated getSnapshot() in StateManager to return channels: [] as placeholder until ChatManager is built in a later task. Messages are intentionally excluded from snapshot (fetched on-demand per channel, matching agentchattr's pattern).

implementationPlan.description: Update docs/SCHEMA.md to document the new ChatMessage and ChatChannel types, the extended Worker.chatCursors field, the extended ProjectSettings chat fields, the new StateChangeEvent variants, and the storage layout (.moe/channels/{id}.json for channel metadata, .moe/messages/{id}.jsonl for append-only messages). Document that schema version will be bumped to 5 in the migration task.
implementationPlan.note: Updated SCHEMA.md with: ChatChannel and ChatMessage type docs with examples, ProjectSettings.chat* fields, Worker.chatCursors, new activity event types (MESSAGE_CREATED, CHANNEL_CREATED), storage layout docs (.moe/channels/ + .moe/messages/), updated entity diagram, updated ID prefix list with chan- and msg-. Documented @mention routing and loop guard behavior. Noted schema version 5 bump will happen in migration task.

implementationPlan.description: Test: Run 'cd packages/moe-daemon && npm run build' to verify no type errors. Fix any compilation issues. Verify that existing code compiles cleanly with the new optional fields and that no existing test suites break.
implementationPlan.note: Build passes (tsc clean, zero errors). All 275 tests pass across 15 test files. No regressions from the new optional fields.
